base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cutscene_backgrounds — a tile from 1988 super mario bros 3. Opening curtain + King-throne-room backgrounds for each world's King-transform cutscene. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Opening curtain + King-throne-room backgrounds for each world's King-transform cutscene
